title: Barron's And Bloomberg 2023 Ideal Dividend Stocks Of The Year
text: Two Barron's Annual Roundtable, plus one Bloomberg Intelligence articles published late-January listed 99 intriguing stocks for 2023; 77 were unduplicated US publicly-listed companies, of which, 56 paid-dividends. Barron's two roundtable discussions January 20 and 27 split 49 picks from 9 panelists in half, whereas Bloomberg detailed all 50 in their January 16 BusinessWeek edition.

title: Sysco Corporation (SYY) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call January 31, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Kevin Kim - Vice President-Investor Relations Kevin Hourican - President and Chief Executive Officer Neil Russell - Interim Chief Financial Officer and SVP of Corporate Affairs Conference Call Participants Kelly Bania - BMO Capital Mark Carden - UBS Edward Kelly - Wells Fargo Jeffrey Bernstein - Barclays John Heinbockel - Guggenheim Partners Lauren Silberman - Credit Suisse Alex Slagle - Jefferies Operator Welcome to Sysco's Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Conference Call. As a reminder, today's call is being recorded.

title: Sysco (SYY) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Sysco (SYY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.61% and 0.74%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For February 2023
text: NOBL fell 4.12% in December, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 6.5%. Thus far this month, through January 25th, the dividend aristocrat ETF is up 1.92% and starting the year on a bright note.

title: February Dividend Kings: 5 Buys; 1 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years."--Dogs of the Dow. The 47 Dividend Kings screened as of January 25, 2023, represented eight of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 12.84%-36.92% topped-by ABM & NFG.

title: Sysco Corporation (SYY) Readies for Q2 Earnings: Things to Note
text: Sysco Corporation's (SYY) second-quarter performance is likely to have witnessed gains from the Recipe for Growth program amid cost concerns.

title: Sysco (SYY) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
text: Sysco (SYY) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Jim Cramer likes these 5 'reasonably' valued stocks in the S&P 500
text: We only want stocks if they're reasonably valued because this market has very little patience for anything expensive,” he said.

title: Sysco: A Tasty Addition To A Dividend Growth Portfolio
text: Sysco is a high-quality company with strong competitive advantages. The company has an impressive history of outperforming the market and rewarding shareholders with increasing dividends and share buybacks.

title: Sysco: A Great Business At A Fair Price
text: Sysco shares have been roughly flat over the past year, significantly outperforming the broader market. In 2022, Sysco benefited from increased consumer spending on dining out following stay-at-home behavior in 2020-21. Sysco has also gained market share as competitors were forced to retrench.

title: My 11 Best Dividend Kings For January 2023
text: The 48 Dividend Kings ended the year with a loss in December, collectively down 3.95%. Last month, the 11 best dividend kings based on forecasted growth and valuation underperformed the average dividend king return by 140 bps.

title: 5 Dividend Aristocrat Buys For January
text: "Dividend Aristocrats. in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of January 3, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 13.23%-26.61% topped by VFC & TGT.
